objective: Produce the M0A distribution ADR from complete, hash-indexed evidence without changing Core behavior.
deliverables: Distribution ADR selecting Sandbox or non-Sandbox Developer ID delivery with rejected alternatives and revalidation triggers.
Hash-indexed M0A evidence summary with every matrix row resolved as passed, failed or blocked.
A proposed next-revision macOS profile/verification patch stored as evidence for separate approval; the pinned profile is not modified during this Task.

verification.method: ADR lint plus independent signed review.
verification.expectedEvidence: The distribution decision is approved, internally consistent and leaves Core behavior unchanged.

stopConditions: Any prerequisite M0A evidence row is missing, ambiguous, unhashed or falsely classified as passed.
The distribution choice requires changing Core behavior, Safety, AC or contract semantics.
The chosen release path lacks a verifiable signing, Hardened Runtime, notarization or entitlement story.
